title: Facility Maintenance Engineer (12hrs Shift)
description:
Job Summary

This position involves maintaining and operating equipment, troubleshooting issues, conducting preventive maintenance, and ensuring facility safety & security. Responsibilities include participating in emergency response activities, documenting procedures, and performing various maintenance tasks. The individual will need to work effectively as part of a team and communicate professionally with colleagues and supervisors.

Job Description

  • Resolve identified engineering issues with equipment to keep downtime to minimum
  • Active participation in first level troubleshooting / root cause isolation / recovery action on all reported incidents and escalate incidents to supervisor
  • Perform planned preventive maintenance (PPM) / Reactive Maintenance (RM) / Service order (SO) to minimize equipment downtime
  • Documentation of standard operating procedures / Checklist of equipment Tasks
  • Work as a team to monitor and perform facility inspections and report on condition affecting operations
  • Performs repairs, maintenance and installation.
  • Conduct routine monitoring and spot checks of all building equipment and systems
  • Involve in company’s Emergency Response team (ERT), first aid and environmental health & safety (EHS) activities
  • Ensure calls are answered and emails are responded in a timely, efficient and professional manner
  • Perform any other duties assigned and assist in ad-hoc tasks by supervisor or manager
  • Contributes to team effort by accomplishing related results as needed.
  • Ensure proper handover and takeover during shift changes.

Job Requirements

  • Computer literate with the ability to compile and submit daily reports.
  • Experience and with understanding mechanical and electrical field / engineering & building services industry
  • Able to read architectural, structural, mechanical and electrical as built will be a plus
  • Able to commit to 12hrs rotating shift work that includes day, night and weekends

Our Commitment That Goes Beyond the Norm

  • An environment where you will be working on cutting-edge technologies and architectures.
  • Safe space where diverse perspectives are valued, and everyone’s unique contributions are celebrated.
  • Meaningful work and projects that make a difference in people’s lives.
  • A fun, passionate and collaborative workplace.
  • Competitive remuneration and comprehensive benefits.

About our Line of Business
Cloud & Data Centre Solutions provides all aspects of cloud management, services, and solutions, from initial setup and migration to ongoing operations and optimization. Services include engineering works to design, build and provide facility management service for mission critical environments such data centers, disaster recovery, and business continuity sites.

Interested candidates may apply to bernice@eps.com.sg with your detailed Resume.
